message.thinking:
We need to produce a JSON array with 3 objects, each corresponds to the questions: 1. Chapters, 2. Description, 3. Structure.

Each object: "question": a string with one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" accordingly. "feedback": Text. "complies": boolean.

Need to evaluate the given text.

Text: "Darbs sastāv no ievada, trim nodaļām un secinājumiem. Pirmajā nodaļā tiek apskatīti noskaņojuma analīzes un aspektā sakņotas noskaņojuma analīzes pamatprincipi un pielietojumi. Otrā nodaļa satur atlasīto mašīnmācīšanās un citu algoritmu, lielo valodas modeļu aprakstus un to salīdzinājumus. Trešajā nodaļā tiek realizēti atlasītie algoritmi. Beigās ir apkopoti secinājumi par darbu."

Question 1: "Chapters": Does the text list the main sections? The text says "trim nodaļām" (three chapters). It names Pirmajā nodaļā, Otrā nodaļa, Trešajā nodaļā. So yes. So compliance True. Feedback: It lists main sections, but could be more explicit. Provide brief feedback.

Question 2: "Description": Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? Yes, it gives a brief description of each chapter. So compliance True.

Question 3: "Structure": Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis? It says introduction, 3 chapters, conclusion. So yes. Compliance True.

But need to check: Maybe the text says "trim nodaļām" but maybe missing the introduction section? It says "Darbs sastāv no ievada, trim nodaļām un secinājumiem." So includes introduction, 3 chapters, conclusions. So structure clear. So compliance True.

Thus all true. Provide feedback summarizing strengths and maybe minor suggestions.

Ensure output is exactly as requested: array of 3 objects.

Ok.
